item.necromancy.necro_goggles.tooltip: While worn as a helmet, faint guides reveal trusted minions' paths and quarrels.
item.necromancy.bodypart.tooltip: A grisly trophy. Stitch four together at a Sewing Machine to summon a minion.
item.necromancy.bodypart.not_validated_t: %s — Not validated — save from the bodypart dev console.
message.necromancy.altar.missing_ingredi: You need a Jar of Blood and a Soul in a Jar before you can summon
gui.necromancy.bodypart_dev.hitbox_secti: Hitbox: ox oy oz  ·  size sx sy sz
gui.necromancy.bodypart_dev.visual_offse: Mesh offset: dx dy dz  ·  rotation: yaw pitch roll
gui.necromancy.bodypart_dev.validated_ye: Validated on disk: yes (Apply + Save updates file)
gui.necromancy.bodypart_dev.validated_no: Validated on disk: no — Save to disk when ready
gui.necromancy.bodypart_dev.flags_help: Which minion slot accepts this bodypart item.
gui.necromancy.bodypart_dev.euler_sectio: Socket euler (degrees) — leave blank to use quaternion or zero
gui.necromancy.bodypart_dev.quat_section: Socket quaternion x y z w — all four required, or leave all blank
gui.necromancy.bodypart_dev.preview_help: Preview updates live while this menu is open. Values are applied on close.
message.necromancy.bodypart_dev.id_misma: Draft id must match the bodypart in the slot.
message.necromancy.bodypart_dev.bad_json: Could not parse bodypart draft JSON.
message.necromancy.bodypart_dev.need_sta: Insert a bodypart item before saving to disk.
message.necromancy.bodypart_dev.save_fai: Could not write bodypart config file.
message.necromancy.bodypart.not_validate: %s: JSON exists but is not validated — open the bodypart dev console and Save to disk.
message.necromancy.altar.parts_unconfigu: Cannot summon until bodypart configs validate for this altar — blocked slots: %s
commands.necromancy.minion.unconfigured_: Cannot spawn: bodypart %s is missing or not validated.
commands.necromancy.dissect.stub: Dissection/scalpel pipeline not wired yet — stub only.
item.necromancy.mob_cage.tooltip: Creative-only placeholder until capture cages ship.
item.necromancy.dev_knob.mode.7: Mode: Socket %s Position (ox/oy/oz) — no-op if socket absent
item.necromancy.dev_knob.mode.8: Mode: Socket %s Rotation (yaw/pitch/roll) — no-op if socket absent
item.necromancy.dev_knob.hint: Hold and scroll to adjust. View dir → axis. Shift/Ctrl/Alt → finer step (0.1 / 0.01 / 0.001 / 0.0001).
jei.necromancy.sewing.title: Sewing Machine
jei.necromancy.guide.title: Necromancy Handbook
jei.necromancy.guide.body_part: A trophy limb taken from %1$s. On the altar or sewing grid it maps to the %2$s slot. Combine four compatible parts at a Sewing Machine with organs and a Soul Heart to sew a spawn egg. Combat traits may appear — see the tooltip.
jei.necromancy.guide.generic_item: Necromancy item with no long guide yet — check crafting uses or related blocks. (%s)
necromancy.slot.head: head
jei.necromancy.guide.item.bone_needle: Place this alongside cloth ingredients on the Sewing Machine — every knit consumes durability from the needle slot.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.soul_in_a_jar: Collected when certain scythes strike mortal foes. Required as catalyst fuel on the Summoning Altar beside blood.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.jar_of_blood: Portable blood for ritual use. Place it in the altar's blood slot to qualify for summoning.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.brain_on_a_sti: Brandished near loyal minions to steer them like unruly pets.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.brains: Greasy organ used as stuffing when stitching flesh spawn eggs at the Sewing Machine.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.heart: Core ingredient for sewn spawn eggs — pairs with other organs and soul-infused thread.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.muscle: Bulk tissue component required by advanced sewing patterns.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.lungs: Keeps breath-themed recipes authentic while assembling animated husks.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.skin: Large sheets wrap assembled limbs before finishing with bone needles.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.necronomicon: Opens command radial for nearby minions — orders stay / follow / dismiss — and lists how many obey you in range.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.scythe: Harvests souls into jars when it connects with qualifying kills.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.scythe_bone: Alternate scythe profile suited for necromancers preferring bone motifs.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.bucket_blood: Carries source-level blood from the world to cauldrons, altar slots or crafting grids.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.spawner: Soul Heart focus item — mandated centerpiece when knitting spawn eggs at the Sewing Machine.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.isaacs_severed: Wearable helm — tears launch while sneaking or ability key depending on client binds.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.tear: Primary projectile ammunition emitted by Isaac's Severed Head.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.tear_blood: Blood variant tear consumed by matching Isaac variants.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.altar: Summoning focus block: insert Jar of Blood (left), Soul in a Jar (right), and four limbs arranged head/torso/arms/legs. Preview before committing — thousands of mob mixes exist; only valid assemblies shown by sewing recipes actually summon.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.altar_block: Structural sibling used for altar aesthetics — does not provide GUI summoning by itself.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.sewing_machine: Four-by-four flesh crafter — demands Bone Needle durability — transforms limbs plus organs into spawn eggs.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.minion_spawn_e: Results from sewing compatible limbs — spawns the stitched Frankenstein minion.
jei.necromancy.guide.item.nightcrawler_s: Summons the stalking Night Crawler mob.
necromancy.patchouli.book.name: Grim Codex
necromancy.patchouli.book.subtitle: Stitched doctrine for apprentices of Necromancy
necromancy.patchouli.book.landing: $(italic)Every corpse is a chapter waiting for needlework.$()$(br2)Use categories like a Lexica: Covenant explains ritual etiquette, Ichor tracks fluids, Sepulcher diagrams blocks, Seamstress & Invocation twin flesh-grid and altar contracts, Dominion teaches verbs, Bestiary logs outputs, Corpus catalogs donor species, Appendix lists viewers and traders.$(br2)$(italic)Shift-click the pencil to reload entries while editing datapacks.
necromancy.feature.skeleton_arm_volley.t: Looses an extra arrow after melee hits.
